overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting the Great Hall during a feast. The player is seated at a long dining table laden with food, panning around to observe Gothic stone architecture, floating candles, massive stained glass windows, and other students in robes eating and conversing.

student in dark robes dining at the table

large round loaf of bread on a raised plate

tall arched wooden doors at the hall entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view seated at a long dining table laden with a feast of bread, sausages, and fruit. The camera slowly pans left, revealing a massive stone fireplace at the far end of the hall and tall wooden entrance doors, while students in dark robes dine nearby.

agents.ego_description: reaching for food on the plate while observing the surrounding students

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back to center and then right, revealing the player's hand reaching for food. The view shifts to show the magnificent tall Gothic windows with blue house banners hanging between them, and floating candles illuminating the hall, while students continue dining and conversing.

rows of long wooden dining tables extending down the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right to look down the central aisle of the Great Hall, showcasing the vast scale of the room with rows of dining tables, students dining in the distance, and the magnificent stained glass windows at the far end. Floating candles hang in the air throughout the space, and the warm sunlight streams through the Gothic windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person pan across a lavish feast in a Gothic hall, moving from an intimate table setting to a sweeping view of the room's immense scale. It begins seated at a long dining table laden with bread, sausages, and fruit, slowly panning left to reveal a massive stone fireplace and tall wooden entrance doors. As the camera swings back toward the center, the player's hand reaches for food before the view shifts right to showcase floating candles and blue house banners hanging between towering Gothic windows. The scene then expands further right to look down the central aisle, revealing rows of dining tables and students stretching into the distance. Finally, the perspective opens up to the far end of the hall, where warm sunlight streams through magnificent stained glass windows.
